shopitems.effectDesc: ATK +10%/+20%
ATK +35%/+60%, ASPD -10
DEF +35%/+60%
RES +20/+35
-30%/-50% Redeployment Time, -30% HP
+35%/+60% HP; if there is no Operator in the tile ahead on deployment, +25% more HP
Gains +5%/+8% ATK on skill activation (stacks up to 10 times)
+25%/+40% ATK; When dealing Arts damage, deals an additional 10% as Burn
+25%/+40% ATK; Upon taking lethal damage for the first time only, HP will not go below 1, lasting for 15 seconds
ATK +25%/+40%, ASPD +30
+25%/+40% ATK; If equipped by a Ground Operator, their attacks have 8% chance of inflicting Frighten for 2 seconds
On Deployment, +3/+6 SP; for every Operator in the same Alliance, +3/+6 more SP
Every attack or heal gives ASPD +1/+2 for this battle, up to 60 stacks
Attacks ignore 25%/40% RES
More likely to be attacked, +30% HP
When ammo-type skills have 1 bullet left for the first time, there is 40%/70% chance of recovering 40% ammo
Attacks on targets 3 or more tiles away deal 25%/40% more damage
For 8/12 seconds after every deployment, attacks inflict 2 seconds of Stun
SP recovery rate +0.15/second/+0.25/second
After deployment, gain Camouflage for 25/50 seconds
When blocking enemies, takes 40%/70% less damage from enemies not blocked by this unit
Attacks have 3%/5% chance to inflict 1 stack of Paralysis on target
Attacks have 18%/30% chance of inflicting Cold on the target for 1s
For every target hit by an attack, recovers 2%/4% Max HP
Destroyed when equipped and grants 1~6/2~12 Funds
When HP is greater than 85%/50%, Operator is immune to Stun, Frozen, and other special statuses
Heals have 10%/15% chance to grant 1 stack of Shield to the target (Max 1 stack)
+10%/+20% ATK, and when dealing Physical or Arts damage, damage type turns into Weakness damage
When defeated in battle, immediately revive (once/twice per battle)
Destroyed when equipped, and if you have at least two of this non-Elite Operator, obtain a third copy; otherwise obtain 1 random non-Elite Operator from the same Alliance
Equippable by any Operator; this is destroyed at the start of the next round, and the Operator is promoted to an Elite Operator
Destroyed when equipped and immediately refreshes shop once, offering only Operators from the same Alliance as the Operator equipped with it

Destroys itself along with the Operator when equipped; automatically chooses a Teammate with the most members in the corresponding Alliance, and dispatches a same-quality copy of that Operator to the Teammate during the next Rest Phase
If no eligible Teammate exists, the original Operator will be returned
Cannot be equipped by Custom Operators

+35%/+60% ATK; If equipped by a [Laterano] Operator, the Operator gains a 35% chance to fire an extra bullet at an enemy within Attack Range, dealing 150% ATK as Physical damage If 'Lateran Clip' is also equipped by the [Laterano] Operator, bullet deals 300% ATK instead

+45%/+70% HP; If equipped by a [Yan] Operator, gain +25 ASPD for every Operator obtained this round before battle begins (Max 3 stacks) If 'Yanese Dagger' is also equipped by the [Yan] Operator, +2 Funds whenever you obtain an Operator (Max 3 times per round)

Damage taken -180/-300; If equipped by an [Ægir] Operator, that Operator's Devour range increases to 4 adjacent tiles, and adds on [Ægir] stacks accordingly If 'Ægirian Blade' is also equipped by the [Ægir] Operator, the Operator gains extra HP equal to the HP of the Devoured allies

+35/+60 ASPD; If equipped by a [Victoria] Operator, the Operator gains effects of all Victorian Hammers on the field (excluding ATK buffs) If any 'Victorian Hammer' is also equipped by the [Victoria] Operator, effects of this 'Victorian Hammer' are doubled

+30/+50 RES; If equipped by a [Kjerag] Operator, when that Operator defeats an enemy, other enemies within a certain range are inflicted with 2 seconds of Cold If 'Kjeragi Nevermeltice' is also equipped by the [Kjerag] Operator, +2 extra seconds of Cold

+25/+40 Starting SP; If equipped by a [Sargon] Operator, the Operator recovers 30 SP when skill ends for the first time If 'Sargonian Teaspresso' is also equipped by the [Sargon] Operator, every skill activation grants 3 SP to all [Sargon] Operators
Destroyed when equipped and increases Deployment Limit to 9
After the battle ends, equipped Operator changes to a random Operator 1 Tier higher

Equipped Operator gains an extra Alliance (based on the other Equipment)
Details can be checked in Equipment's Talent tab during simulations (check the end of the page)
For every 8/6 Operators sold, obtain an extra copy of the Operator (non-Elite) with this equipped
Drag onto field to use; obtains Operator in range (Includes Elite Operators and equipment!)
Drag onto field to use and select a bounty to challenge
